'''Skotcarps''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]]. Making their home on the shale slopes of [[Mount Ste'vshuulsz]], the skotcarps were small and fast, hiding below ground during daylight hours.

{{Species-stub}}
